## Summary

Explain the problem and the change in a few sentences.

## Behavior and Compatibility

- Describe user-visible, protocol, configuration, or deployment effects.
- Call out compatibility, migration, backpressure, or failure-mode changes.

## Verification

List the focused checks you ran and their results.

## Documentation

- [ ] Documentation is not affected.
- [ ] Documentation was updated.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and includes relevant tests.
- [ ] No credentials, private keys, or customer data are included.
- [ ] The pull request description explains how to reproduce or verify the behavior.
